title: theobroma speciosum var. spruceanum
intro: Theobroma speciosum var. spruceanum, also known as the Amazonian tree cacao, is a lesser-known variety of the cacao tree, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is a plant with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The leaves and bark of this plant are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, providing potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Theobroma speciosum var. spruceanum include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make tea, although the specific methods and dosages may vary depending on the traditional usage and individual needs.
